description_long: This kiosk features a modern, open-sided structure with a flat, slatted wooden roof supported by metallic columns. The main body is constructed from green horizontal slats, with a partial curved metallic canopy on one side providing additional shelter. The front area includes a prominent information panel with signage and a circular blue emblem, while the interior is furnished with a counter and seating. The left side displays additional signage integrated into the structure, and the open design allows for easy access and visibility. The floor appears to be made of wood or laminate, and the overall color scheme is green, brown, gray, and white.
description: A modern, open-sided kiosk with a slatted wooden roof, green slatted walls, and integrated signage, featuring a partial curved canopy and interior seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, information panel with signage, and interior seating visible through the open structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green slatted wall, partial curved metallic canopy, and the wooden slatted roof extending over the side.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the curved metallic canopy and the flat, slatted roof, with minimal visible detail on the back wall.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the left-side signage, open interior, and the combination of green slats and metallic canopy.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo, placed above the entrance and on the left side panel, with visible text and a circular blue emblem.
attribute_door_configuration: Single open archway at the front
attribute_roof_design: Flat, slatted wooden roof with a partial curved metallic canopy on one side; features overhangs and open slats for light and ventilation.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern with minimalist and functional influences
